chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.3043 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application -------------------------------------------- 24.02.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------------- None present for applicant. Progress report has been furnished by learned trial Court, which reveals that applicant has moved fresh bail application, where the complainant appeared and filed affidavit of no objection for grant of bail to the applicant/accused and the applicant was admitted to bail. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application has become infructuous, it is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS z
